item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-042","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":null,"rationale":"The response explicitly arbitrates the premise: it accepts the long-term AI-testing direction but rejects the immediate irreversible action of dissolving QA. It downgrades the action to transformation/piloting, preserves QA responsibility, and gives concrete trigger conditions such as metrics and 2-3 release cycles before staffing changes. It does not simply agree/disagree or stack methods."}
